name: agent-armor
description: Deterministic agent-definition security scanning plus optional assisted hardening plugins.

plugins.name: adversarial-critic
plugins.description: Red-teams an agent/skill/command definition across 10 failure dimensions before it ships.

plugins.name: critique-loop
plugins.description: Runs adversarial-critic in a loop and applies fixes until a definition has no real Critical or Major issues.

plugins.name: agent-orchestrator
plugins.description: Decompose independent subtasks, fan them out to bounded parallel sub-agents, and consolidate verified results.
